chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1464 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 31.10.2016. None present for petitioners. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G a/w SHO/SIP Ghulam Mustafa Laghari, self and o/b of SSP Naushero Feroze, DSP/SDPO Moro and o/b of DIG Shaheed Benazirabad and SIP Abrar Rind SHO P.S Daur District Shaheed Benazirabad = Today, Mr. Shahzad Ali Mastoi, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.16-Mir Hassan and submits that in the earlier C.P. No.S-1583 of 2016 filed by present respondent No.16, wherein the present petitioners were also parties, was disposed of, inter-alia, with certain directions. The learned Assistant A.G has filed the parawise comments of different police officials and has pointed out in the parawise comments of respondent No.4-DSP Daur that petitioners are involved in FIR No.81 of 2016 and petitioner No.2-Ali Asghar Machi S/o Ghulam Mustafa is an absconding accused. According to learned A.A.G, the above case has been challaned and is sub judice in the Court of Civil Judge/Judicial Magistrate-I Taluka Daur. In view of the above, the instant petition is devoid of merits, which is accordingly dismissed, as pendency of a criminal case cannot be termed as a harassment. JUDGE Shahid
